notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Missed catch error by first baseman Curtis Mead on the pickoff attempt. Kyle Tucker to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: José Tena pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: José Tena singles on a line drive to right fielder Kyle Tucker, deflected by first baseman Freddie Freeman. Jorbit Vivas scores.

notableEvents.label: James Wood GIDP
notableEvents.detail: James Wood grounds into a double play, first baseman Freddie Freeman to shortstop Miguel Rojas. José Tena out at 2nd. James Wood out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Cycle game
notableEvents.detail: Team hit a single, double, triple, and home run
